description: Purchase orders (POs) allow managers to order stock from suppliers. A PO contains a supplier reference, line items (each referencing a catalog item with quantity and unit cost), expected delivery date, and notes. POs follow a status workflow: draft → submitted → partially received → fully received, or cancelled at any point before fully received. The PO list page at /app/purchase-orders shows all POs with filtering by status and supplier. A create/edit form lets users build POs with line items, and an auto-suggest feature recommends low-stock items when creating a PO. Only Admin and Manager roles can create, edit, and manage POs. All authenticated users can view POs.

stories.title: Purchase orders list table
stories.description: Create src/components/purchase-orders/PurchaseOrdersTable.tsx — a data table at /app/purchase-orders. Columns: PO Number (auto-generated PO-XXXX format), Supplier Name, Status (badge: draft=gray, submitted=blue, partially_received=amber, fully_received=green, cancelled=red), Line Items Count, Total Cost (formatted currency), Expected Delivery (date), Created Date. Data from usePurchaseOrders(). Pagination at 20 per page. Sorted newest first by default. Row click opens detail view.
acceptanceCriteria: Table renders all columns with PO data
Status badges with correct colors per status
Total cost calculated from sum of line items (qty × unit_cost)

verification.test: Enter demo mode, /app/purchase-orders. Table shows POs from seed data. Status badges colored correctly. Total cost column shows calculated values. No console errors.

stories.notes: Table with 6 seed POs, status badges, pagination, formatted costs, row click handler.

stories.title: Purchase orders filters
stories.description: Create src/components/purchase-orders/PurchaseOrdersFilters.tsx — filter bar above the PO table. Filters: Status (multi-select: draft, submitted, partially_received, fully_received, cancelled), Supplier (select from supplier list), Date Range (from/to date pickers for created date). All filters are client-side against the loaded PO data. Active filter count badge. 'Clear Filters' button resets all.
acceptanceCriteria: Supplier dropdown populated from suppliers data
Date range filters by created date
Responsive: filters stack vertically on mobile

verification.test: Enter demo mode, /app/purchase-orders. Filter by status 'draft' — only draft POs shown. Filter by supplier — narrows results. Apply date range — filters by date. Clear filters — all POs return. No console errors.

stories.notes: Status multi-select, supplier dropdown, date range filters with AND logic. Clear button. Mobile sheet.

stories.title: PO create/edit form — header fields
stories.description: Create src/components/purchase-orders/PurchaseOrderFormSheet.tsx — a Sheet (600px) for creating/editing POs. Header section fields: Supplier (required, select from supplier list), Expected Delivery Date (date picker, required), Notes (textarea, optional), Status display (read-only for existing POs). PO Number auto-generated on create. Zod validation. Form supports both create and edit modes. Admin/Manager only.
acceptanceCriteria: Sheet with supplier select, date picker, notes
Create mode: empty form, 'New Purchase Order' title
Status shown as read-only badge in edit mode

verification.test: Enter demo mode, /app/purchase-orders. Click 'New PO'. Sheet opens. Try saving without supplier — validation error. Select supplier and date, save — PO created with auto number. Open existing PO — edit mode with pre-filled fields. No console errors.

stories.notes: Sheet with supplier select, date picker, notes. Zod validation. Create mode generates PO-YYYY-XXXX number. Edit mode shows status badge.

stories.title: PO line items editor
stories.description: Add line items section to PurchaseOrderFormSheet. Create src/components/purchase-orders/LineItemsEditor.tsx — a dynamic list of line items. Each line: Item (select from catalog items, searchable), Quantity (number, required, min 1), Unit Cost (number, required, min 0), Line Total (qty × cost, read-only). Add Item button appends a new empty row. Remove button (X) on each row. Running total at bottom. At least one line item required to save the PO.
acceptanceCriteria: Dynamic line item rows with item select, qty, cost
Item select is searchable across catalog items
At least one line item required validation

verification.test: Enter demo mode, create new PO. Add line item — select item, enter qty 10, cost 5.00 — line total shows 50.00. Add second item. Running total updates. Remove first item. Try saving with zero items — validation error. No console errors.

stories.notes: LineItemsEditor component with add/remove rows, auto-calculated line totals, running total, validation for at least 1 item. Integrated into PO form sheet.

stories.title: Low-stock item suggestions
stories.description: Create src/components/purchase-orders/LowStockSuggestions.tsx — shown in the PO form when creating a new PO and a supplier is selected. Displays a compact list of items from that supplier where quantity_on_hand <= reorder_point. Each suggestion shows item name, SKU, current qty, reorder point, and a '+ Add' button that adds the item as a line item with suggested quantity (reorder_point - quantity_on_hand + safety buffer of 20%). If no low-stock items, section hidden.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows low-stock items for selected supplier
Each suggestion: name, SKU, current qty, reorder point
'+ Add' button adds item to line items with suggested qty
Hidden when no low-stock items for supplier

verification.test: Enter demo mode, create new PO. Select a supplier with low-stock items — suggestions appear. Click '+ Add' — item added to line items with calculated qty. Change supplier — suggestions update. No console errors.

stories.notes: LowStockSuggestions shows items where currentStock<=reorderPoint for selected supplier. +Add creates line item with suggested qty (deficit×1.2). Hidden in edit mode.

stories.title: PO status workflow actions
stories.description: Create src/components/purchase-orders/POStatusActions.tsx — action buttons that change PO status. Draft → 'Submit' button (changes to submitted). Submitted → 'Cancel' button. Any non-final status → 'Cancel' (with AlertDialog confirmation). Cancelled and fully_received are terminal states with no actions. Status transitions: draft→submitted, submitted→partially_received (handled by receiving in PRD-12), submitted→cancelled, partially_received→fully_received (handled by receiving), partially_received→cancelled, draft→cancelled. Each transition updates the PO and shows toast. Admin/Manager only.
acceptanceCriteria: Draft PO shows Submit and Cancel buttons
Cancelled PO shows no action buttons
Fully received PO shows no action buttons
Status change updates PO and shows toast

verification.test: Enter demo mode. Open draft PO — Submit and Cancel visible. Click Submit — status changes to submitted, toast shown. Open submitted PO — Cancel visible. Click Cancel — confirmation dialog — confirm — status cancelled. No console errors.

stories.notes: POStatusActions: Submit (draft→submitted), Cancel with AlertDialog. Terminal states show nothing. Admin/Manager only.

stories.title: PO detail sheet
stories.description: Create src/components/purchase-orders/PurchaseOrderDetailSheet.tsx — a Sheet (600px) showing full PO details. Header: PO number, status badge, supplier name (link to supplier detail), dates (created, expected delivery). Line items table: item name, SKU, qty ordered, unit cost, line total. Footer: total cost. Status action buttons from POStatusActions. Edit button for draft POs only (admin/manager). Close button.
acceptanceCriteria: Sheet shows PO number, status, supplier, dates
Supplier name links to supplier detail
Line items table with all columns
Edit button only for draft POs (admin/manager)

verification.test: Enter demo mode, /app/purchase-orders. Click a PO row — detail sheet opens with all info. Line items listed. Status actions visible. For draft PO — edit button shown. For submitted PO — no edit. Supplier name clickable. No console errors.

stories.notes: Detail sheet with PO info, supplier link, line items table, total, status actions, edit button for draft only.

stories.title: PO delete for draft only
stories.description: Add delete action for POs in draft status only (admin only). Delete button in PO detail sheet and in row actions dropdown. AlertDialog confirmation: 'Delete this draft purchase order? This cannot be undone.' Deleting removes the PO and all its line items. Non-draft POs cannot be deleted — only cancelled.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete option only for draft POs
Non-draft POs have no delete option

verification.test: Enter demo mode (admin). Open draft PO — delete option visible. Confirm delete — PO removed from table. Open submitted PO — no delete option. No console errors.

stories.notes: Delete button in detail sheet for draft POs, admin only. AlertDialog confirmation. Deletes PO and closes sheet with toast.

stories.title: Purchase orders page composition
stories.description: Compose the full /app/purchase-orders page in src/routes/app.purchase-orders.tsx. Header: 'Purchase Orders' heading, PO count, '+ New PO' button (admin/manager). Filters bar. Table. Detail sheet wired to row clicks. Form sheet for create/edit. URL param ?po=ID for direct linking. Page title 'Purchase Orders — Stackwise'.
acceptanceCriteria: Page heading with count and New PO button
Filters, table, detail sheet, form all composed
Row click opens detail, URL updates
New PO button opens form sheet
Requestor: no new/edit/delete buttons, can view only

verification.test: Enter demo mode, /app/purchase-orders. Page renders fully. Click 'New PO' — form opens. Click row — detail opens, URL updates. Navigate to ?po=ID directly — detail opens. Switch to requestor — action buttons hidden, can still view. No console errors.

stories.notes: Page composed with filters, table, detail sheet, form sheet. validateSearch for ?po=ID. Requestor can view but no create/edit/delete. Route guard updated to allow requestor access.

stories.title: PO summary stats
stories.description: Create src/components/purchase-orders/POSummaryStats.tsx — metric pills above the filters bar. Stats: Total POs (count), Draft (count), Awaiting Delivery (submitted count), Completed (fully_received count). Each pill shows label and count. Counts update based on current filters. Styled as compact inline badges similar to movement summary stats.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 metric pills: Total, Draft, Awaiting, Completed

verification.test: Open /app/purchase-orders in demo mode. Summary stats show correct counts matching the table data. Apply a filter — counts update. No console errors.

stories.notes: 4 metric pills (Total, Draft, Awaiting Delivery, Completed) above filters. Counts reflect filtered data.
